< !DOCTYPE html> < !DOCTYPE html> < 超文本标记语言< css长= " zh-CN" >html lang="zh-CN"> < < 头 head 头>head> SFS 贪官排行榜</ & lt;title> <meta 元 name 名字 名字="description" content 内容="Spaceflight Simulator 贪官排行榜 - 用最少质量完成任务的极限挑战"> <style 风格> @font-face { font-family: 'BigShoulders'; src: url('./_shared/fonts/BigShoulders-Regular.ttf') format('truetype'); font-weight: 400; } @font-face { font-family: 'BigShoulders'; src: url('./_shared/fonts/BigShoulders-Bold.ttf') format('truetype'); font-weight: 700; } @font-face { font-family: 'InstrumentSans'; src: url('./_shared/fonts/InstrumentSans-Regular.ttf') format('truetype'); font-weight: 400; } @font-face { font-family: 'InstrumentSans'; src: url('./_shared/fonts/InstrumentSans-Bold.ttf') format('truetype'); font-weight: 700; } @font-face { font-family: 'JetBrainsMono'; src: url('./_shared/fonts/JetBrainsMono-Regular.ttf') format('truetype'); font-weight: 400; } @font-face { font-family: 'JetBrainsMono'; src: url('./_shared/fonts/JetBrainsMono-Bold.ttf') format('truetype'); font-weight: 700; } </style> <style> :root { --bg: #0a0a0a; --bg2: #141414; --bg3: #1c1c1c; --ink: #e8e8e8; --muted: #777; --rule: #2a2a2a; --accent: #ffffff; --accent2: #888; --gold: #ffd700; --silver: #c0c0c0; --bronze: #cd7f32; --font: 'InstrumentSans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; --font-display: 'BigShoulders', Impact, sans-serif; --font-mono: 'JetBrainsMono', 'Courier New', monospace; --max: 1100px; } *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } html { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { font-family: var(--font); color: var(--ink); background: var(--bg); line-height: 1.7; padding: 0; min-height: 100vh; } /* === Scrollbar === */ ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg); } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--rule); border-radius: 3px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--muted); } /* === Navigation === */ .nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; background: rgba(10,10,10,0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); padding: 0 1rem; } .nav-inner { max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 56px; } .nav-logo { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--accent); text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; } .nav-logo span { color: var(--muted); font-weight: 400; } .nav-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0; overflow-x: auto; } .nav-tab { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: all 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .nav-tab:hover { color: var(--ink); } .nav-tab.active { color: var(--accent); border-bottom-color: var(--accent); } /* === Page Container === */ .page { max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 1.5rem 4rem; } /* === Hero === */ .hero { text-align: center; padding: 3rem 0 2rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); margin-bottom: 2.5rem; } .hero-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .hero-sub { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .hero-stats { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .hero-stat { text-align: center; } .hero-stat-num { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); } .hero-stat-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; } /* === Section === */ .section { margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; } .section-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--accent); } .section-badge { font-size: 0.7rem; font-family: var(--font-mono); padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 3px; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } /* === Filters === */ .filters { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .filter-btn { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.8rem; background: var(--bg2); color: var(--muted); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .filter-btn:hover { color: var(--ink); border-color: var(--accent2); } .filter-btn.active { color: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--bg3); } /* === Table === */ .table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--bg2); } table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; min-width: 600px; } thead th { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--muted); padding: 0.75rem 1rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); background: var(--bg3); position: sticky; top: 0; } thead th:first-child { padding-left: 1.25rem; } tbody td { padding: 0.7rem 1rem; font-size: 0.88rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); vertical-align: middle; } tbody tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; } tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); } tbody td:first-child { padding-left: 1.25rem; } /* Rank */ .rank { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; width: 40px; text-align: center; } .rank-1 { color: var(--gold); } .rank-2 { color: var(--silver); } .rank-3 { color: var(--bronze); } /* Mission name */ .mission { font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink); } .mission-tag { display: inline-block; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.6rem; padding: 0.1rem 0.35rem; margin-left: 0.4rem; border-radius: 2px; vertical-align: middle; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .tag-baseline { background: var(--accent); color: var(--bg); } .tag-bug { background: var(--muted); color: var(--bg); } .tag-electric { background: var(--rule); color: var(--ink); border: 1px solid var(--muted); } .tag-pureoil { background: var(--bg3); color: var(--accent2); border: 1px solid var(--accent2); } /* Weight */ .weight { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--accent); } /* Player */ .player { color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.85rem; } .player-admin { color: var(--accent2); } .player .admin-badge { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.55rem; padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem; border: 1px solid var(--accent2); border-radius: 2px; margin-left: 0.3rem; vertical-align: middle; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } /* === Notice Box === */ .notice { background: var(--bg2); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-left: 3px solid var(--accent2); border-radius: 4px; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; } .notice strong { color: var(--ink); } .notice ul { margin: 0.5rem 0; padding-left: 1.2rem; } .notice li { margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .notice .emoji { margin-right: 0.25rem; } /* === Reward Box === */ .reward-box { background: var(--bg2); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 6px; padding: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .reward-box h3 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.9rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .reward-item { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--muted); padding: 0.35rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; } .reward-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .reward-icon { font-size: 0.9rem; flex-shrink: 0; } /* === Legend === */ .legend { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); } .legend-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 2px; } /* === Empty State === */ .empty-state { text-align: center; padding: 3rem 1rem; color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.9rem; } .empty-state .big { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--accent2); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; text-transform: uppercase; } /* === Footer === */ .footer { border-top: 1px solid var(--rule); padding-top: 2rem; text-align: center; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 2rem; } .footer a { color: var(--accent2); text-decoration: none; } .footer a:hover { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: underline; } /* === Hidden === */ .hidden { display: none !important; } /* === Responsive === */ @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav-inner { height: auto; flex-direction: column; padding: 0.75rem 0; gap: 0.5rem; } .page { padding: 1.5rem 1rem 3rem; } .hero { padding: 2rem 0 1.5rem; } .hero-stats { gap: 1.25rem; } .hero-stat-num { font-size: 1.4rem; } table { min-width: 480px; } .notice { font-size: 0.8rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; } } @media (max-width: 480px) { .nav-tab { padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem; font-size: 0.78rem; } .filters { gap: 0.35rem; } .filter-btn { font-size: 0.68rem; padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; } } </style> </head> <body> <!-- Navigation --> <nav class="nav"> <div class="nav-inner"> <div class="nav-logo">SFS <span>Leaderboard</span></div> <div class="nav-tabs"> <a class="nav-tab active" data-mode="realistic" onclick="switchMode('realistic')">Realistic</a> <a class="nav-tab" data-mode="simple" onclick="switchMode('simple')">Simple</a> </div> </div> </nav> <div class="page"> <!-- Hero --> <header class="hero"> <h1 class="hero-title">SFS 贪官排行榜</h1> <p class="hero-sub">Spaceflight Simulator — 用最少质量完成任务的极限挑战</p> <div class="hero-stats"> <div class="hero-stat"> <div class="hero-stat-num" id="stat-realistic">5</div> <div class="hero-stat-label">Realistic 纪录</div> </div> <div class="hero-stat"> <div class="hero-stat-num" id="stat-simple">9</div> <div class="hero-stat-label">Simple 纪录</div> </div> <div class="hero-stat"> <div class="hero-stat-num" id="stat-total">14</div> <div class="hero-stat-label">Total</div> </div> </div> </header> <!-- ==================== REALISTIC MODE ==================== --> <div id="mode-realistic"> <!-- Reward --> <div class="reward-box"> <h3>奖励规则</h3> <div class="reward-item"> <span class="reward-icon">🎯</span> <span>打破任一纪录：B站奖励两个币</span> </div> <div class="reward-item"> <span class="reward-icon">✅</span> <span>打破纪录 0~0.2%：上任翔宇科技群管理员</span> </div> <div class="reward-item"> <span class="reward-icon">🔥</span> <span>打破纪录 ≥0.2%：上任翔宇科技群 + 轨跃航天局管理员</span> </div> </div> <!-- Notice --> <div class="notice"> <strong>注意事项</strong> <ul> <li>以上记录均为 <strong>Realistic 模式</strong>，版本 1.6.00.0+</li> <li>无改文件、固推、磁推、模组、bug 等一切作弊行为</li> <li>无人任务使用 <strong>3吨 银色控制器</strong>，载人任务使用 <strong>4吨 咖啡色载人舱</strong></li> <li>标 <span class="tag-baseline mission-tag">基准</span> 号为无任何 bug 的基准纪录，未标的利用了底层大气减速 bug</li> <li>分为 <strong>可用电推</strong> 与 <strong>纯油（禁电推）</strong> 两个类别</li> </ul> </div> <!-- Realistic Records --> <section class="section"> <div class="section-header"> <h2 class="section-title">Realistic 纪录榜</h2> <span class="section-badge">v1.6.00.0+</span> </div> <!-- Legend --> <div class="legend"> <div class="legend-item"> <div class="legend-dot tag-baseline"></div> <span>基准（无 bug）</span> </div> <div class="legend-item"> <div class="legend-dot tag-bug"></div> <span>特降（大气减速 bug）</span> </div> </div> <!-- Filters --> <div class="filters"> <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all" onclick="filterRealistic('all', this)">全部</button> <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="electric" onclick="filterRealistic('electric', this)">可用电推</button> <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="pureoil" onclick="filterRealistic('pureoil', this)">纯油</button> </div> <div class="table-wrap"> <table id="table-realistic"> <thead> <tr> <th style="width:50px">#</th> <th>任务</th> <th style="width:110px">质量</th> <th style="width:110px">记录者</th> <th style="width:100px">类别</th> <th style="width:80px">类型</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody id="tbody-realistic"> <!-- Populated by JS --> </tbody> </table> </div> </section> </div> <!-- ==================== SIMPLE MODE ==================== --> <div id="mode-simple" class="hidden"> <!-- Reward --> <div class="reward-box"> <h3>奖励规则</h3> <div class="reward-item"> <span class="reward-icon">🎯</span> <span>打破任一纪录：可上任群管理员，并标注记录保持者</span> </div> <div class="reward-item"> <span class="reward-icon">✅</span> <span>打破纪录 0~0.2%：上任翔宇科技群管理员</span> </div> <div class="reward-item"> <span class="reward-icon">🔥</span> <span>打破纪录 ≥0.2%：上任翔宇科技群 + 轨跃航天局管理员</span> </div> </div> <!-- Notice --> <div class="notice"> <strong>注意事项</strong> <ul> <li>以上记录均为 <strong>Simple 模式</strong>，版本 1.5.10.2+（宇航员尽量不要用 👸‍🚀❌）</li> <li>无改文件、固推、磁推、模组、bug 等一切作弊行为</li> <li>标 <span class="tag-baseline mission-tag">基准</span> 号为无任何 bug 的基准纪录，未标的利用了底层大气减速 bug</li> <li>分为 <strong>可用电推</strong> 与 <strong>纯油（禁电推）</strong> 两个类别</li> <li>基准为无 bug，特降为利用底层大气减速 bug 或零度热盾 bug</li> <li>真实难度记录较少，欢迎各位添加记录（需发视频和重量）</li> </ul> </div> <!-- Simple Records --> <section class="section"> <div class="section-header"> <h2 class="section-title">Simple 纪录榜</h2> <span class="section-badge">v1.5.10.2+</span> </div> <!-- Legend --> <div class="legend"> <div class="legend-item"> <div class="legend-dot tag-baseline"></div> <span>基准（无 bug）</span> </div> <div class="legend-item"> <div class="legend-dot tag-bug"></div> <span>特降（大气减速/热盾 bug）</span> </div> </div> <!-- Filters --> <div class="filters"> <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all" onclick="filterSimple('all', this)">全部</button> <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="electric" onclick="filterSimple('electric', this)">可用电推</button> <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="pureoil" onclick="filterSimple('pureoil', this)">纯油</button> <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="baseline" onclick="filterSimple('baseline', this)">仅基准</button> <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="bug" onclick="filterSimple('bug', this)">仅特降</button> </div> <div class="table-wrap"> <table id="table-simple"> <thead> <tr> <th style="width:50px">#</th> <th>任务</th> <th style="width:110px">质量</th> <th style="width:130px">记录者</th> <th style="width:100px">类别</th> <th style="width:80px">类型</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody id="tbody-simple"> <!-- Populated by JS --> </tbody> </table> </div> </section> </div> <!-- Footer --> <footer class="footer"> <p>SFS 贪官排行榜 — Spaceflight Simulator 最低质量挑战</p> <p style="margin-top:0.5rem">数据格式化存储，方便添加和更换纪录</p> </footer> </div> <script> // ============================================= // DATA CONFIGURATION - Edit records here! // ============================================= // // 添加/修改记录说明: // mode: "realistic" 或 "simple" // mission: 任务名称 // weight: 质量（吨，数字） // player: 记录保持者 // baseline: true=基准（无bug）, false=特降（利用bug） // electric: true=可用电推, false=纯油（禁电推） // admin: true=此记录者已任管理员（可选标记） // // ============================================= var RECORDS = [ // ===== REALISTIC MODE ===== { mode: "realistic", mission: "入轨", weight: 15.65, player: "SFS-Moon", baseline: true, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "realistic", mission: "金星往返", weight: 113.45, player: "SFS-Moon", baseline: true, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "realistic", mission: "冥王星往返", weight: 47.15, player: "SFS-Mars", baseline: false, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "realistic", mission: "小行星往返", weight: 19.72, player: "SFS-Mars", baseline: false, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "realistic", mission: "进入太阳", weight: 59.43, player: "SFS-Mars", baseline: false, electric: true, admin: true }, // ===== SIMPLE MODE ===== { mode: "simple", mission: "金星往返", weight: 26.82, player: "古月木兆", baseline: true, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "simple", mission: "纯油金星往返", weight: 119.14, player: "青椒", baseline: false, electric: false, admin: true }, { mode: "simple", mission: "月球往返", weight: 10.39, player: "10086", baseline: false, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "simple", mission: "火星着陆", weight: 9.90, player: "10086", baseline: true, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "simple", mission: "火星往返", weight: 14.10, player: "10086", baseline: true, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "simple", mission: "逃出太阳系", weight: 9.94, player: "10086", baseline: false, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "simple", mission: "往返小行星", weight: 9.94, player: "10086", baseline: false, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "simple", mission: "冥王星往返", weight: 13.60, player: "10086", baseline: false, electric: true, admin: true }, { mode: "simple", mission: "进入木星大气", weight: 18.15, player: "SFS-Mars", baseline: true, electric: true, admin: true } ]; // ============================================= // APPLICATION LOGIC // ============================================= var currentMode = 'realistic'; function switchMode(mode) { currentMode = mode; // Update nav tabs document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(function(tab) { tab.classList.toggle('active', tab.dataset.mode === mode); }); // Show/hide mode sections document.getElementById('mode-realistic').classList.toggle('hidden', mode !== 'realistic'); document.getElementById('mode-simple').classList.toggle('hidden', mode !== 'simple'); // Reset filters if (mode === 'realistic') { filterRealistic('all', document.querySelector('#mode-realistic .filter-btn[data-filter="all"]')); } else { filterSimple('all', document.querySelector('#mode-simple .filter-btn[data-filter="all"]')); } } function getRecords(mode) { return RECORDS.filter(function(r) { return r.mode === mode; }) .sort(function(a, b) { return a.weight - b.weight; }); } function renderRow(record, index) { var rankClass = index < 3 ? ' rank-' + (index + 1) : ''; var baselineTag = record.baseline ? '<span class="mission-tag tag-baseline">基准</span>' : '<span class="mission-tag tag-bug">特降</span>'; var electricTag = record.electric ? '<span class="mission-tag tag-electric">电推</span>' : '<span class="mission-tag tag-pureoil">纯油</span>'; var playerClass = record.admin ? 'player player-admin' : 'player'; var adminBadge = record.admin ? '<span class="admin-badge">ADMIN</span>' : ''; return '<tr data-baseline="' + record.baseline + '" data-electric="' + record.electric + '">' + '<td><span class="rank' + rankClass + '">' + (index + 1) + '</span></td>' + '<td class="mission">' + escapeHtml(record.mission) + ' ' + baselineTag + electricTag + '</td>' + '<td class="weight">' + record.weight.toFixed(2) + 't</td>' + '<td class="' + playerClass + '">' + escapeHtml(record.player) + adminBadge + '</td>' + '<td class="player">' + (record.electric ? '可用电推' : '纯油') + '</td>' + '<td class="player">' + (record.baseline ? '基准' : '特降') + '</td>' + '</tr>'; } function filterRealistic(filter, btn) { // Update filter buttons var container = document.getElementById('mode-realistic'); container.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); }); if (btn) btn.classList.add('active'); var records = getRecords('realistic'); var tbody = document.getElementById('tbody-realistic'); var html = ''; var idx = 0; records.forEach(function(record) { var show = true; if (filter === 'electric' && !record.electric) show = false; if (filter === 'pureoil' && record.electric) show = false; if (show) { html += renderRow(record, idx); idx++; } }); tbody.innerHTML = html || '<tr><td colspan="6"><div class="empty-state"><div class="big">暂无记录</div><p>该分类下暂无纪录</p></div></td></tr>'; } function filterSimple(filter, btn) { var container = document.getElementById('mode-simple'); container.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); }); if (btn) btn.classList.add('active'); var records = getRecords('simple'); var tbody = document.getElementById('tbody-simple'); var html = ''; var idx = 0; records.forEach(function(record) { var show = true; if (filter === 'electric' && !record.electric) show = false; if (filter === 'pureoil' && record.electric) show = false; if (filter === 'baseline' && !record.baseline) show = false; if (filter === 'bug' && record.baseline) show = false; if (show) { html += renderRow(record, idx); idx++; } }); tbody.innerHTML = html || '<tr><td colspan="6"><div class="empty-state"><div class="big">暂无记录</div><p>该分类下暂无纪录</p></div></td></tr>'; } function escapeHtml(str) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = str; return div.innerHTML; } // ============================================= // INITIALIZATION // ============================================= (function init() { var realisticCount = RECORDS.filter(function(r) { return r.mode === 'realistic'; }).length; var simpleCount = RECORDS.filter(function(r) { return r.mode === 'simple'; }).length; document.getElementById('stat-realistic').textContent = realisticCount; document.getElementById('stat-simple').textContent = simpleCount; document.getElementById('stat-total').textContent = realisticCount + simpleCount; filterRealistic('all', document.querySelector('#mode-realistic .filter-btn[data-filter="all"]')); filterSimple('all', document.querySelector('#mode-simple .filter-btn[data-filter="all"]')); })(); </script> </body> </html>
